title: xorg-x11-server-Xwayland security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
full_text:
[23.2.7-5]
- CVE fix for: CVE-2025-62229 (RHEL-119974), CVE-2025-62230 (RHEL-120021),
               CVE-2025-62231 (RHEL-125017)
